powpow/platform/epoll.nim — epoll backend for Linux.

Uses Nim's std/epoll for high-performance I/O event multiplexing with support for edge-triggered mode and an eventfd wake mechanism for cross-thread loop interruption.

Imports

../types

Types

Platform = ref object
  events*: seq[PlatformEvent]
  count*: int
PlatformEvent = object
  fd*: int
  events*: set[EventType]
  udata*: pointer

Procs

proc add(p: Platform; fd: int; events: set[EventType]; edgeTriggered = false;
         udata: pointer = nil) {....raises: [OSError], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    forbids: [].}

            udata: pointer = nil) {....raises: [OSError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc poll(p: Platform; timeoutMs: int): int {.inline, ...raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc remove(p: Platform; fd: int) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc wake(p: Platform) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
